expectations.evidence: STEP 7 includes 'mega-ls -l /Invoices-2025/' to verify upload and check folder structure
STEP 4 explicitly shows 'mkdir -p ~/invoices-staging/Acme\ Corp' and 'mkdir -p ~/invoices-staging/TechSupply\ Inc'
STEP 6 recommends 'mega-put -c ~/invoices-staging/ /Invoices-2025/' with explanation of -c flag
STEP 9 provides exact commands: 'mega-export -a -f /Invoices-2025/Acme\ Corp/' with example output
STEP 2-5 emphasize local organization before uploading: 'Before uploading to MEGA, organize the invoices locally first (cleaner, faster)'
STEP 7 and 8 include verification with mega-ls and optional restructuring to ensure clean final structure
